data.title: BiomX Launches Security Subsidiary in Israel and Will Initially Invest Over $3 million In Its Operations
data.description: An initiative has been launched to enter Israel's expanding autonomous AI sector for defense, firefighting, and first response. The move comes amid significant growth in these fields within the country. This groundbreaking initiative will involve investing in cutting-edge technology and expertise to enhance capabilities in these crucial areas. Israel's autonomous AI defense, firefighting, and first response industries are booming, and this initiative is set to play a key role in further advancing these sectors.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics Receives Approval from Israeli Ministry of Health to Initiate Phase 2/3 Clinical Trial of SIL204 in Locally Advanced Pancreatic Cancer
data.description: A major regulatory development has been reached, signaling progress into clinical-stage development of a new generation RNAi therapy. This therapy utilizes a unique systemic delivery method to target prevalent KRAS-driven cancers, addressing a significant medical need. This advancement marks a crucial step in potentially providing treatment for numerous patients affected by this type of cancer.
Harrow Announces Add-On Offering of $50.0 Million of Senior Unsecured Notes to Support Growth

data.title: NSPJ Announces New Mission Statement
data.description: NSPJ Architects, headquartered in Prairie Village, Kansas, known for its tradition of exceptional design, aims to improve lives through innovative design practices. The firm, established in 1955, focuses on creating vibrant living spaces that cater to modern lifestyles. Specializing in architecture and landscape architecture, NSPJ Architects has gained a reputation for excellence in design. Their commitment to crafting distinctive environments has led to the successful completion of over 1000 projects. The firm's dedication to creativity and functionality has garnered them numerous awards and recognition within the industry. Through their unique approach to architectural design, NSPJ Architects continues to set new standards for creating exceptional and inspiring spaces.

data.title: Inflectra Launches Rapise 9.0 with AI-Powered Self-Healing Web Tests and Enhanced Inflectra.ai Integration
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Washington, Inflectra, a top company in software testing and quality assurance solutions, unveiled Rapise 9.0. This release brings revolutionary AI-driven self-healing features that will redefine how organizations manage their software. This advanced technology will significantly impact software maintenance and improve the overall quality assurance processes.

data.title: True Organic™ Announces New Potting and Planting Collection, Bringing Farm-Grade Excellence to the Home Garden
data.description: A major commercial organic fertilizer manufacturer based on the West Coast has made a significant expansion into premium soils. In a recent development on March 26, 2026, True Organic™ announced the launch of seven specialized blends at retail outlets throughout the Western United States. This move marks a strategic shift for the company, known for its high-performance organic fertilizers. The expansion aims to cater to a wider market and capitalize on the growing demand for premium soil products.

data.title: One of Asia's Largest Academy Award® Accredited Festivals to Open May 25 in Tokyo and Online
data.description: The worldwide event "Cinema Engineering" delves into the future of the film industry, boasting a staggering 5,000 submissions from across the globe. Additionally, the festival introduces innovative sensory experiences with its new "Food" and "Art" programs. Scheduled to take place in Tokyo on March 26, 2026, this year's edition of the Short Shorts Film Festival & Asia (SSFF & ASIA) has garnered significant attention as an Academy Award® accredited international short film festival.

data.title: Western Region State Chapters Join Together to Guide Financial Education and Advocacy Projects
data.description: In Sacramento, California, on March 26, 2026, the National Financial Educators Council® (NFEC) announced its increased involvement in the Western Region of the U.S. with established state chapters in California, Oregon, and Washington. Together, these chapters are part of an expanding...

data.title: America's Energy System Is at a Breaking Point, and AI Is Accelerating the Crisis
data.description: The CEO of Q Hydrogen warns that if urgent action is not taken to modernize the U.S. energy grid, the country faces the risks of energy poverty, national security vulnerabilities, and a decade of stagnant growth. The statement was made in Manchester, New Hampshire on March 26, 2026. The current energy grid is struggling to meet the increasing demand it was not originally equipped to handle, particularly with the influence of AI data centers.

data.title: Pants Expert: Where Comfort Meets Everyday Performance
data.description: Established in 2014, G4Free is a leading authority in women's pants, aiming to cater to the diverse roles modern women undertake. There has been a noticeable trend of women preferring clothing that accommodates their active lifestyles.

data.title: Cadeler announces planned investments in exceptional growth opportunities, balanced with dividend potential from strong cash flows
data.description: Cadeler, based in Copenhagen, Denmark, has successfully concluded a private placement that generated around EUR 175 million. The price exceeded the Company’s 5-day VWAP and will be utilized for the initial capital requirements for two upcoming T-class Wind Foundation Installation Vessel new constructions and the potential procurement and conversion of a scour protection vessel. Cadeler's fleet expansion strategy is designed to maintain a definite route to capital returns. The company is expecting continued solid operating cash flows to support this growth.

data.title: 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: The 2026 Annual General Meeting of Golar LNG Limited is scheduled for May 19, 2026. Shareholders are required to vote by April 6, 2026. Shareholder materials, including the notice and agenda, will be sent out using usual channels before the meeting. Additionally, all relevant information will be accessible on the company's website: www.golarlng.com.

data.title: Xnurta Appoints Former WPP Commerce Executive Luis Pedro Martinez as Managing Director, Europe
data.description: Xnurta, an agentic AI-powered advertising platform in retail media based in Bellevue, Washington, has recently welcomed Luis Pedro Martinez as their Managing Director for Europe. Martinez, who was previously a VP at WPP Media UK, brings over 15 years of experience in technology, retail media, and agency leadership to the role. His appointment signifies a pivotal move in Xnurta's global expansion strategy and aims to enhance the company's connections with global brands. Martinez will be stationed in London to oversee operations in the European market.
